popularStory.headline: Bernard of Neufmarché (c.?1050-c.?1125)
popularStory.description: Bernard of Neufmarché (c.?1050-c.?1125) was "the first of the original conquerors of Wales." He was a minor Norman lord who rose to power in the Welsh Marches before successfully undertaking the invas …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Bernard of Neufmarché於大約1050年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利福馬賀時，他的父親Geoffrey de Neufmarché27歲，母親Ada II de Hugleville16歲。他於大約1067年與Agnes Fitz Rolf在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1125年在威爾士布雷康史爾享年76歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bernard of Neufmarché于大约1050年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利福馬賀时，他的父亲Geoffrey de Neufmarché27岁，母亲Ada II de Hugleville16岁。他于大约1067年与Agnes Fitz Rolf在英国英格兰哈普爾維古姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1125年在威尔士布雷康史爾享年76岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Bernard of Neufmarché was born about 1050, in Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Geoffrey de Neufmarché, was 27 and his mother, Ada II de Hugleville, was 16. He married Agnes Fitz Rolf about 1067, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1125, in Breconshire, Wales, at the age of 76, and was buried in Gloucester Cathedral, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bernard of Neufmarché est né environ 1050, à Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Geoffrey de Neufmarché, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ada II de Hugleville, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Fitz Rolf environ 1067, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1125, à Breconshire, Galles, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucester Cathedral, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bernard of Neufmarché um 1050 in Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Neufmarché 27 und seine Mutter Ada II de Hugleville 16. Er hat um 1067 in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Fitz Rolf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1125 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Breconshire, Wales und wurde in Gloucester Cathedral, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard of Neufmarché è nato il circa 1050 nel Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Geoffrey de Neufmarché, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Ada II de Hugleville, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Fitz Rolf circa 1067, nel Winchester, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1125, nel Breconshire, Galles, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Gloucester Cathedral, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Bernard of Neufmarchéが約1050年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメネウフマルチeで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Neufmarchéは27歳，母Ada II de Huglevilleは16歳であった。約1067年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターでAgnes Fitz Rolfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1125年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアで76歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスター カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bernard of Neufmarché(이)가 대략 1050년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 니우프마che에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Neufmarché(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Ada II de Hugleville(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1067년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 Agnes Fitz Rolf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1125년 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 그루스스터 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard of Neufmarché nasceu aproximadamente 1050, em Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Geoffrey de Neufmarché, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Ada II de Hugleville, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Fitz Rolf aproximadamente 1067, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1125, em Breconshire, Gales, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Gloucester Cathedral, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bernard of Neufmarché родился около 1050 г. в местности неуфмарчe, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Neufmarché было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada II de Hugleville, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Fitz Rolf около 1067 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1125 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности глоусестир кэтедраль, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bernard of Neufmarché nació aproximadamente 1050, en Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Geoffrey de Neufmarché, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Ada II de Hugleville, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Agnes Fitz Rolf aproximadamente 1067, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1125, en Breconshire, Gales, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Gloucester Cathedral, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
